mapper.select: SELECT room_id, room_type, area, introduce, photo_url, price FROM t_room WHERE price BETWEEN #{startPrice} AND #{endPrice} ORDER BY price ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_room WHERE room_id = #{roomId}
SELECT r.room_id, r.room_type, r.area, r.introduce, r.photo_url, r.price FROM t_room r WHERE r.room_id NOT IN (SELECT room_id FROM t_book_a_room) AND r.room_id NOT IN (SELECT room_id FROM t_order)
